sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1599" key="a)ei/qouros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀεί-θουρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1599.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ever-warlike</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:189" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.189</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
